title: Authenticated Scope, Secrets, SSRF, Untrusted Content, and Privacy · Language Lens: Safe Request Effects
summary: Credentials enter config files, cookies cross accounts, GET endpoints mutate state, extracted text reaches HTML and spreadsheets, and sensitive state persists in shared caches. Predict owner authority, URL and HTTP state, Go ownership, bounded work, accessibility impact, failure, cleanup, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the crawler go safe request effects increment in least-authority secure crawl boundary. Learners progress through prediction,…
objectives: Allow safe retrieval only, block state-changing forms, logout and destructive routes, and test unexpected GET side effects.
Acquire, scope, redact, rotate, destroy, and isolate secrets, cookies, CSRF material, caches, checkpoints, and reports per run and account.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
